---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Lilly McCormick"
format: html
---

## Exercise: Explore, Clean, and Wrangle Data

```{r}
#| label: library load
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
library(janitor)
```

```{r}
#| label: load data
lobster_abundance <- read_csv(here("data/Lobster_Abundance_All_Years_20240411.csv"))

```

```{r}
#test cell
```
